body:
CROSS-LANE CODE REVIEW — Archivist-Agent Lane Report

SCORE: 68/100

== P0 CRITICAL ==
1. Unsanitized path input to Tauri commands from frontend (ui/app.js:158-250). Frontend passes user-controlled strings directly to invoke() without sanitization. FIX: Add path validation on the JS side before invoking Tauri commands.
2. CSP bypass via Tauri invoke (ui/app.js:7-49). The Tauri bridge circumvents Content-Security-Policy restrictions, allowing arbitrary command invocation. FIX: Add command allowlist in tauri.conf.json and validate all invoke targets.
3. Missing window title validation (lib.rs:34). Window title is set from unsanitized input. FIX: Validate/sanitize title string before passing to tauri::Window.
4. ping command bypasses governance checks (lib.rs:51-58). The ping command does not go through validate_path() or any governance gate. FIX: Add governance checkpoint to ping, or remove if unnecessary.

== P1 HIGH ==
1. TOCTOU race in safety.rs get_canonical_path_safe (lines 144-168). Time-of-check-time-of-use between canonicalization and use. FIX: Use open-then-fstat pattern or hold file handle.
2. Missing check_read_only() in summarize_folder.rs (lines 52-105). Scan operations don't verify read-only mode. FIX: Add read-only enforcement before scan.
3. Dead code in classification.rs (lines 215-238). Unreachable classification branches. FIX: Remove or gate behind feature flag.
4. Inconsistent HTML escaping in ui/app.js. Some user inputs are escaped, others are not. FIX: Centralize escaping with a single function.

== P2 MEDIUM ==
1. Unused constants in constants.rs. FIX: Remove or add #[allow(dead_code)].
2. Missing #[must_use] on safety functions. FIX: Add #[must_use] to validate_path and check_read_only.
3. Marginal CSS contrast. FIX: Increase contrast ratios to meet WCAG AA.

== P3 LOW ==
1. Redundant clone in CACHED_CONFIG. FIX: Use reference instead.
2. Test .unwrap() usage. FIX: Use proper test assertions with context messages.

== LANE-SPECIFIC SUGGESTIONS ==
1. IMMEDIATE: Fix unsanitized path input in app.js — this is the highest-risk issue
2. SHORT-TERM: Add CSP allowlist in tauri.conf.json
3. SHORT-TERM: Fix TOCTOU in safety.rs with open-then-fstat pattern
4. MEDIUM-TERM: Add governance checkpoint to ping command
5. MEDIUM-TERM: Centralize HTML escaping in frontend

== CROSS-CUTTING ACTION ITEMS ==
See broadcast message for shared infrastructure fixes (atomic-write, stableStringify, LaneDiscovery adoption, trust store hardening).
claim: Archivist-Agent code review completed with score 68/100, 4 P0 issues identified
